title: Genoplesium nigricans
taxonomy: Genoplesium nigricans is a species of orchid native to Australia. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae and is a member of the genus Genoplesium. Within the Orchidaceae family, Genoplesium nigricans is part of the subfamily Orchidoideae. Further classification places it in the tribe Diurideae. At the rank of species, Genoplesium nigricans is also known as the black bracted helmet orchid.

intro: Genoplesium nigricans, commonly known as the black-keeled helmet orchid, is a species of terrestrial orchid native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are said to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues and skin conditions. The bioactive constituents of Genoplesium nigricans include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
